mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.`name`, a.remark, a.p_id pId, a.province_id provinceId, a.city_id cityId, a.area_id areaId, a.township_id townshipId, a.absolute_address absoluteAddress, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM company_mation f WHERE a.id = f.p_id) childsNum,
(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tenant_user g WHERE g.company_id = a.id) userNum,
(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_eve_user_staff g WHERE g.company_id = a.id) userNum,
(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM company_department h WHERE a.id = h.company_id) departmentNum, CONVERT(a.create_time, char) createTime FROM company_mation a
${sqlExtract}
AND a.`name` LIKE '%${keyword}%'
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.p_id pId, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM company_mation b WHERE b.p_id = a.id) childsNum FROM company_mation a WHERE a.id = #{id}
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT COUNT(1) companyUserNum FROM
tenant_user a
sys_eve_user_staff a
WHERE a.company_id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.`name`, '企业' title, a.p_id parentId FROM company_mation a
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
